author: perrotta
body:
#### PR description:


This PR ports to autoCond the 2025 and 2026 realistic MC GTs after the following updates:
- The 2025 MC GT was synchronized with the updates already integrated in 150X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v14 and not yet ported to the 151X version of it; moreover, the fixed SiPixelStatus tags are also integrated
- The 2026 MC GT synchronizes the Geometry with the one already implemented in 151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic (plus a ZDC related addition for the HCal reco geometry already implemented in the current online GTs); moreover, the fixed SiPixelStatus tags are also integrated

To give some more detail:

- 151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v5 - Synchronize with 150X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v14, i.e.:
   - Update JetCorrector parameters:
https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/call-for-conditions-for-the-spring25-mc-global-tag/119464/33
  - Update SiStrip bad channels as in https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/call-for-conditions-for-the-spring25-mc-global-tag/119464/37
  - Update SPixel and Pixel Alignment tags as in https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/call-for-conditions-for-the-spring25-mc-global-tag/119464/38
  - (SiPixelStatus will be synchronized separalely)
- [151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v6](https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/list/Prod/gts/151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v6)
  - Update SiPixelStatusScenario as in https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/call-for-conditions-for-the-winter26-mc-global-tag/140278/18

- 160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v3
  - Synchronize the Geometry tags with the 2025 ones already implemented in 151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic as originally described in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/48365
  - Update also the HCal reco geometry with the ZDC as it is implemented since Nov. 2025 in the data taking GTs, see the update of HCALRECO_Geometry_v1_hlt in https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/hlt-prompt-full-track-validation-2025-full-zdc-reconstruction-step-2/135095/8
- [160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v5](https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/list/Prod/gts/160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v5)
  - Update SiPixelStatusScenario as in https://cms-talk.web.cern.ch/t/call-for-conditions-for-the-winter26-mc-global-tag/140278/18

The differences with the GTs previously in confDB follows:
- [Diff between 151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v6 and 151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v4](https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/diff/Prod/gts/151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v4/151X_mcRun3_2025_realistic_v6)
- [Diff between 160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v5 and 160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v2](https://cms-conddb.cern.ch/cmsDbBrowser/diff/Prod/gts/160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v2/160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v5)


#### PR validation:

Tested in master

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport of #50274
title: Update 2025 and 2026 MC GTs  - CMSSW_16_0_X
